phrases.intent_en: Ask how to join a guided tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo unirme a una visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KO-mo PWEH-do oo-NEER-meh a OO-na vee-SEE-ta gee-AH-da?

likely_response.local: Diríjase al mostrador de recepción, allí le asignan grupo.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN ahl-LÍ LEH ah-SEEH-nahn GROO-poh
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, book online or ask here.

responses.english: Good morning, book online or ask here.
responses.phonetic: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN ahl-LÍ LEH ah-SEEH-nahn GROO-poh
responses.local: Diríjase al mostrador de recepción, allí le asignan grupo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de las audioguías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DON-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh lahs ow-dee-oh-GEE-ahs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Camino artifacts exhibit is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la exposición del Camino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN del kah-MEE-noh?

likely_response.local: Suba al segundo piso, sala del Claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh SAH-lah DEHL klah-OO-stroh

responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh SAH-lah DEHL klah-OO-stroh
responses.local: Suba al segundo piso, sala del Claustro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cathedral ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de la catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL

likely_response.local: Fuera, junto a la Puerta Santa, derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: foo-EH-rah HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah SAHN-tah deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Outside, next to the Puerta Santa, on the right.

responses.english: Outside, next to the Puerta Santa, on the right.
responses.phonetic: foo-EH-rah HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah SAHN-tah deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Fuera, junto a la Puerta Santa, derecha.
